roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE - FILED

/CAL PTC/INTC/VD HEARING DATE OF 12-10-20/ /X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TAMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT 5,  PC 32, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWA/IRR/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PTC/INTC/X:COURT ADMONISHES THE DEFENDANT AND ASKS THAT HE CHECK IN WITH PTD BY PHONE TWICE A WEEK, NOT IN PERSON,/X:HEARING DATE OF 07-01-20 IN DEPT 22 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN DEPT, 23 & TO SET JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY AND MTS, FORTHWITH FROM M12/LD:05-04-20/INTC/WITEXCL:THECOURT/INVOFF:SFPD OFFICER ROBERT GILSON/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER ROBERTGILSON/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER VICTOR CUSTODIO/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - A CERTIFIED COPY OF THE STAY AWAY ORDER FOR CASE #19005221/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 -A CLEAR PLASTIC BAG WITH SUSPECTED NARCOTICS/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CTORD:MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS DENIED/HTA1:001-003/DEF:REMAINS ON ACM AND EM WITH GPS/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/PD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X: THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 03-17-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2: 1155 MARKET ST, SF/SAORD3/TE: 1 HR/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING,  03-16-20, D9/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET TRIAL/DAWT/CONTD: PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE IN S23/CONTD: TO SETTRIAL IN S22/DOPC/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL & MOT TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/EMTERM/CONT/
/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL/INTC/CONTD:TO SET JURY TRIAL & MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/
